title: Decide and narrow Steuerboard role
goal: Resolve the contradiction between Steuerboard's non-authoritative self-contract and external action-readiness ownership, then keep a bounded repo-state/readiness adapter or migrate and retire overlapping surfaces.

acceptance.assertion: One normative decision states whether Steuerboard owns a bounded readiness derivation or has no continuing standalone authority.
The exact Grabowski, Bureau and Cabinet consumers of Steuerboard outputs are tested live or marked absent.
switch-main and ff-only mutation paths are assigned to one owner and are not duplicated with Grabowski.
A tested migration/retirement plan or a sharply reduced keep-plan is delivered without breaking current consumers.

lease_scope_migration.rationale: The Steuerboard decision changes bounded role/task truth and architecture documentation in Bureau.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

authority_decision.steuerboard: Owns read-only repository observation and source-bound readiness/evidence derivation only; it has no approval or execution authority.
authority_decision.grabowski: Owns live precondition revalidation and concrete Git, network, branch, worktree, host, process, lease, durable-task and worker effects.
authority_decision.bureau: Owns commitments, queue order, coordination claims and revision-bound completion truth.
authority_decision.cabinet_systemkatalog: No current Steuerboard execution consumer was found; readable research/decision projection remains separate from execution authority.

fresh_validation.smoke: all entrypoints exited 0 and emitted valid JSON

host_contaminated_run.cause: An unexplained /tmp/.git marker caused synthetic /tmp/test-repo paths to be classified as inside a Git worktree.
host_contaminated_run.does_not_establish: a Steuerboard code regression; the same commit passed the full deploy-check in a mount namespace with clean /tmp.

consumer_proof.grabowski: Current source uses Steuerboard only as repo_state_context=steuerboard_operator_report and explicitly does not establish steuerboard_report_action_approval; no retired mutation command invocation was found.
consumer_proof.bureau: Current source contains no invocation of run-switch-main, run-git-pull-ff-only or fetch-origin-prune; stale ownership wording was narrowed in README.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/ownership.md and docs/plans/bureau-boundary-ops-v1.md by this closeout.
consumer_proof.cabinet_systemkatalog: GitHub resolves heimgewebe/cabinet to heimgewebe/systemkatalog; current code search found no Steuerboard reference and no run-switch-main consumer.

validated_acceptance.authority-decision: PASS: one normative boundary now states Steuerboard is read-only observation/readiness-evidence derivation, while Grabowski owns live revalidation and execution effects.
validated_acceptance.consumer-proof: PASS: Grabowski was inspected as a read-only report consumer; Bureau has no retired command invocations and its stale owner text is corrected; Cabinet/Systemkatalog has no current consumer.
validated_acceptance.mutation-boundary: PASS: switch-main, git-pull-ff-only and fetch-origin-prune are classified retired_compatibility/fail-closed in Steuerboard; concrete Git/network/branch/worktree effects are assigned to Grabowski.
validated_acceptance.migration-or-keep: PASS: the reduced keep-plan from Steuerboard PR #92 is retained and freshly validated with 1,453 tests plus schema/example and smoke checks; no active consumer requires restoration of mutation authority.
